programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Agnese's illness forces Andrea to accept her condition; the new head physician handles a case that will require someone to make a tragic compromise; Lorenzo is entrusted with a patient who has arrived from a nursing home.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Federico deals with his last day at Ambrosiano Hospital; Martina makes a decision that leaves the rest of the team stunned; Doc must come to terms with the truth Agnese has told him.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc faces his first day as head doctor with new responsibilities to manage, without ever forgetting the patients despite the pressure of the new Administrative Director.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: The ward is unbalanced after hearing the news about Doc's memory; Agnese worries that recovering Doc's memory will shake up Andrea's new life; Damiano fears the effect the news might have on Giulia; Doc is increasingly excited.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc keeps delving into his memory and gets a clear lead to follow; Federico is entrusted to take care of a popular travel blogger, but their encounter is expected to trigger more than a few problems.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: The search for Doc's memory appears to have reached a dead end; Federico finds himself under pressure in the ward; Riccardo faces a case that throws him into crisis and pushes his relationship with Martina to the limit.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Andrea asks Enrico to stop the treatment because he finds it difficult to accept what the new memory seems to be telling him; Rita, a young girl, refuses chemotherapy; Andrea and his team must handle the case of a patient they know all too well.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc drags Giulia in his search to understand his past better; Angelo, a patient whose condition forces Martina to prove herself, also has troubles with his past.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc appears to be having side effects from the therapy sessions with Enrico; Agnese grabs the opportunity to crush his research into the past; Giulia is certain that Andrea shouldn't give up in spite of his difficulties.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc finally figures out how to locate the woman he is pursuing, but he needs to muster the courage to do so; Ric takes on the case of an undisciplined personal trainer; Damiano must manage the hospitalisation of a model.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc has a strong fear of learning about the secret of his past; Giula is left to look after a patient who appears to be hiding something; Enrico must deal with Barbara's assaults, which might be more than just infatuation.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Doc doesn't want a machine to replace him so he gets into a competition with an AI; a case forces Martina to come to terms with her conscience; in order to keep one of Andrea's secrets safe, Agnese must make a horrible choice.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Agnese's words create a conflict with Andrea; Teresa must work wonders to find a place for Diana's daughter; Elisabetta gets admitted to the ward after a few days of illness, indicating a more severe issue.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: A major quake causes panic at Ambrosiano Hospital. Federico faces surgery he's not ready for. Someone could expose Martina's secret. Doc helps a pregnant woman while trapped in elevator.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: The deadline to submit the research is approaching, but Giulia seems to be distracted; Doc finds it difficult to handle the numerous commitments; Lin's sister gets hospitalised and it prompts the resident to come to terms with her father.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Giulia must make a decision about her personal life that will also affect her career; Martina gives the most challenging exam of her life; Ric is forced to come to terms with Alba's ghost; Lin and Federico resume working on the database.

programme.title: Doc - In Your Hands
programme.desc: Agnese's illness forces Andrea to accept her condition; the new head physician handles a case that will require someone to make a tragic compromise; Lorenzo is entrusted with a patient who has arrived from a nursing home.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: With little evidence to guide them, the SVU steps in when a woman undergoing psychedelic-assisted therapy recovers a buried memory of assault. Curry starts a new position at SVU.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson is shocked to find undercover Det. Velasco at the center of a sex trafficking bust. When more women are smuggled into the city, a rescued victim begs SVU to help save her sister.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: With little evidence to guide them, the SVU steps in when a woman undergoing psychedelic-assisted therapy recovers a buried memory of assault. Curry starts a new position at SVU.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson is shocked to find undercover Det. Velasco at the center of a sex trafficking bust. When more women are smuggled into the city, a rescued victim begs SVU to help save her sister.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon
programme.desc: Emmy and Grammy Award-winning comedian Jimmy Fallon brings his unique high-energy comedy to the storied 60-year NBC franchise with his welcoming interview style, love of audience participation, spot-on impersonations and innovative sketches.

programme.title: Late Night With Seth Meyers
programme.desc: Late Night with Seth Meyers is executive produced by the Emmy Award-winning Lorne Michaels and is home to A-list celebrity guests, memorable comedy and the best in musical talent.
